response:
```sql
WITH monthly_signups AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) AS month,
        COUNT(id) AS signup_count
    FROM 
        users
    GROUP BY 
        DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)
),
growth_rate AS (
    SELECT 
        month,
        signup_count,
        LAG(signup_count) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS previous_signup_count
    FROM 
        monthly_signups
)
SELECT 
    month,
    signup_count,
    previous_signup_count,
    CASE 
        WHEN previous_signup_count = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE (signup_count - previous_signup_count) / previous_signup_count::FLOAT * 100
    END AS growth_rate_percentage
FROM 
    growth_rate;
```
